item.title: Happy birthday, Brion Gysin! Born 110 years ago today, Brion was an artist, writ...
item.description:
@drea_m_achine

Happy birthday, Brion Gysin!

Born 110 years ago today, Brion was an artist, writer, painter and poet. Alongside Allen Ginsberg, Jack Kerouac and William Burroughs, he was one of the creative luminaries of the Beat Generation.

His extraordinary but little-known invention, pictured here in 1959, was the inspiration for Dreamachine.

An experimental homemade device comprising of just cardboard and a record player, this kinetic artwork used flickering light to generate kaleidoscopic patterns and explosions of colour inside the mind of the viewer.

Designed to be the ‘first art object to be viewed with your eyes closed’, Brion had a pioneering vision for his invention to replace the television in every home in America. He died before this ambition could be realised, but the idea of using technology to reconnect us with inner selves remains just as relevant today.

Radically reimagined for the 21st century, Dreamachine uses light and spatial sound in an architect-designed multisensory installation, creating a collective experience that is unique for each participant.

During the experience, you are immersed in a luminous and colour drenched internal world, unbounded by walls, screens or devices. Sound fills the space in every direction - moving above you, below you and seemingly through you. Impossible to fix in place, the patterns, forms and visions that you see are not being created by another artist, but by you. It’s a magic trick, powered by your own brain.

Read more about the Dreamachine on our website - link in bio.

#dreamachine #psychedelic #consciousness
item.content:encoded:
@drea_m_achine

Happy birthday, Brion Gysin!

Born 110 years ago today, Brion was an artist, writer, painter and poet. Alongside Allen Ginsberg, Jack Kerouac and William Burroughs, he was one of the creative luminaries of the Beat Generation.

His extraordinary but little-known invention, pictured here in 1959, was the inspiration for Dreamachine.

An experimental homemade device comprising of just cardboard and a record player, this kinetic artwork used flickering light to generate kaleidoscopic patterns and explosions of colour inside the mind of the viewer.

Designed to be the ‘first art object to be viewed with your eyes closed’, Brion had a pioneering vision for his invention to replace the television in every home in America. He died before this ambition could be realised, but the idea of using technology to reconnect us with inner selves remains just as relevant today.

Radically reimagined for the 21st century, Dreamachine uses light and spatial sound in an architect-designed multisensory installation, creating a collective experience that is unique for each participant.

During the experience, you are immersed in a luminous and colour drenched internal world, unbounded by walls, screens or devices. Sound fills the space in every direction - moving above you, below you and seemingly through you. Impossible to fix in place, the patterns, forms and visions that you see are not being created by another artist, but by you. It’s a magic trick, powered by your own brain.

Read more about the Dreamachine on our website - link in bio.

#dreamachine #psychedelic #consciousness
item.author: drea_m_achine

item.title: How does the Dreamachine work? The rich inner experiences created by the Dreamac...
item.description:
@drea_m_achine

How does the Dreamachine work?

The rich inner experiences created by the Dreamachine are linked to a phenomenon known as ‘entrainment’. The frequency of the flickering light imposes a ‘beat’ on the rhythms of the brain, similar to the ‘alpha’ rhythm – the brain waves normally present when we’re awake, but relaxed. This discovery was first made by the pioneering British neuroscientist Dr Grey Walter in the 1950s.

There are many different theories about why flickering light generates such vivid visual experiences, and the question of how this arises is still unanswered. Our scientific team at the Centre for Consciousness Science, University of Sussex, have been investigating this mystery for over a decade and exploring what it might reveal about the nature of consciousness.

For a deeper dive into the mysteries and the science behind the Dreamachine, visit our Journal via the link in our bio. #Dreamachine
item.content:encoded:
@drea_m_achine

How does the Dreamachine work?

The rich inner experiences created by the Dreamachine are linked to a phenomenon known as ‘entrainment’. The frequency of the flickering light imposes a ‘beat’ on the rhythms of the brain, similar to the ‘alpha’ rhythm – the brain waves normally present when we’re awake, but relaxed. This discovery was first made by the pioneering British neuroscientist Dr Grey Walter in the 1950s.

There are many different theories about why flickering light generates such vivid visual experiences, and the question of how this arises is still unanswered. Our scientific team at the Centre for Consciousness Science, University of Sussex, have been investigating this mystery for over a decade and exploring what it might reveal about the nature of consciousness.

For a deeper dive into the mysteries and the science behind the Dreamachine, visit our Journal via the link in our bio. #Dreamachine
item.author: drea_m_achine

item.title: A big welcome to all our new followers! For those who’ve recently joined us: Dre...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (3 medier)

@drea_m_achine

A big welcome to all our new followers!

For those who’ve recently joined us: Dreamachine is an immersive, multisensory experience like no other, the world's first collective experience designed to be viewed with your eyes closed. Weaving together light and spatial sound, the kaleidoscopic world created by Dreamachine comes from within, and every person's experience is completely unique.

From May to September 2022, Dreamachine celebrated four sell-out, 5* reviewed shows in the four nations of the UK. Our audiences shared profound and transformative reflections on their experience: we changed how people view themselves and their lives. Discover more about us on our website via the link in our bio.

We’ll be announcing the next exciting plans for Dreamachine and its future touring soon, so sign up to our mailing list on our website (via the link in our bio) to be the first to hear our news.

#Dreamachine #immersiveexperience

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.content:encoded:
🖼️ Slideshow (3 medier)

@drea_m_achine

A big welcome to all our new followers!

For those who’ve recently joined us: Dreamachine is an immersive, multisensory experience like no other, the world's first collective experience designed to be viewed with your eyes closed. Weaving together light and spatial sound, the kaleidoscopic world created by Dreamachine comes from within, and every person's experience is completely unique.

From May to September 2022, Dreamachine celebrated four sell-out, 5* reviewed shows in the four nations of the UK. Our audiences shared profound and transformative reflections on their experience: we changed how people view themselves and their lives. Discover more about us on our website via the link in our bio.

We’ll be announcing the next exciting plans for Dreamachine and its future touring soon, so sign up to our mailing list on our website (via the link in our bio) to be the first to hear our news.

#Dreamachine #immersiveexperience

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.author: drea_m_achine

item.title: News from Dreamachine’s composer, @mrjonhopkins, who has today released the seco...
item.description:
🎬 Video

@drea_m_achine

News from Dreamachine’s composer, @mrjonhopkins, who has today released the second single RITUAL (palace) from his forthcoming album.

The glowing melodic core of the album, “RITUAL (palace)” shimmers with possibility, described by Jon as a ‘glittering elevation, where reverberating notes and nurturing pads are joined by a deep, rhythmic pulse and layered vocals, alive with melodic interplay and a gently propulsive grace’.

RITUAL is an evolution of the music composed for Dreamachine in 2022, inspired by the feeling of intention and ceremony inherent in the Dreamachine experience. The original score provides the soundtrack to Dreamachine’s cerebral journey, designed to build inner connection.

Dreamachine was the first time Jon composed music specifically to be played in spatial sound, creating a new sonic landscape within our bespoke immersive listening environment designed by Turner Prize-winning artists, @assembleofficial alongside our award winning creative team. Hear from Jon talking about the development of Dreamachine here.

To be the first to find out about our next locations and where you can experience Dreamachine for yourself, sign up to our e-newsletter via the link in our bio. RITUAL will be released on August 30th via @dominorecordco. #Dreamachine #RITUAL #immersivesound

▶️ Åbn video direkte · se på Instagram
item.content:encoded:
🎬 Video

@drea_m_achine

News from Dreamachine’s composer, @mrjonhopkins, who has today released the second single RITUAL (palace) from his forthcoming album.

The glowing melodic core of the album, “RITUAL (palace)” shimmers with possibility, described by Jon as a ‘glittering elevation, where reverberating notes and nurturing pads are joined by a deep, rhythmic pulse and layered vocals, alive with melodic interplay and a gently propulsive grace’.

RITUAL is an evolution of the music composed for Dreamachine in 2022, inspired by the feeling of intention and ceremony inherent in the Dreamachine experience. The original score provides the soundtrack to Dreamachine’s cerebral journey, designed to build inner connection.

Dreamachine was the first time Jon composed music specifically to be played in spatial sound, creating a new sonic landscape within our bespoke immersive listening environment designed by Turner Prize-winning artists, @assembleofficial alongside our award winning creative team. Hear from Jon talking about the development of Dreamachine here.

To be the first to find out about our next locations and where you can experience Dreamachine for yourself, sign up to our e-newsletter via the link in our bio. RITUAL will be released on August 30th via @dominorecordco. #Dreamachine #RITUAL #immersivesound

▶️ Åbn video direkte · se på Instagram
item.author: drea_m_achine

item.title: Dreamachine is the first project in the world to explore the phenomenon of strob...
item.description:
@drea_m_achine

Dreamachine is the first project in the world to explore the phenomenon of stroboscopically-induced visual stimulation on such a public scale. The diverse range of experiences paints a fascinating portrait of human consciousness.

Bringing to light our inner differences could be transformational for society. Perceptual diversity applies to everyone: there is no single way of perceiving the world against which others can be compared, and found wanting.

Combining the insights from the Dreamachine experience and the findings from our ground-breaking citizen science project, The Perception Census, our research team are now developing major new studies on the nature of perceptual diversity - how we each experience the world in our own unique way.

Explore more about the initial findings of The Perception Census on our website - link in bio.

#Dreamachine
item.content:encoded:
@drea_m_achine

Dreamachine is the first project in the world to explore the phenomenon of stroboscopically-induced visual stimulation on such a public scale. The diverse range of experiences paints a fascinating portrait of human consciousness.

Bringing to light our inner differences could be transformational for society. Perceptual diversity applies to everyone: there is no single way of perceiving the world against which others can be compared, and found wanting.

Combining the insights from the Dreamachine experience and the findings from our ground-breaking citizen science project, The Perception Census, our research team are now developing major new studies on the nature of perceptual diversity - how we each experience the world in our own unique way.

Explore more about the initial findings of The Perception Census on our website - link in bio.

#Dreamachine
item.author: drea_m_achine
